note: SNG-215 §C: per-trait player-facing readouts for the merged character sheet. Each trait shows LORE (from its own definition's description/gmHint) AND MECHANICS (authored here — what it DOES functionally). Aevi-authored 2026-07-22; CCode wires the merged view + a mechanics-lookup by trait id. Keyed to background/origin ids from backgrounds.json/origins.json. Traditions/schools/forms extend this map as those readouts are authored.

duelist.lore: One blade, one opponent, one exchange. You were trained for the moment where it is only the two of you and everything is decided in about a second.
duelist.gmHint: Reads a single opponent perfectly and a melee badly. Contemptuous of brawls. Has killed, formally, and it was witnessed.
duelist.mechanics: Affinity: Fight — actions in this vein come a little easier. Grants the strategist aptitude at creation. A martial background: it shapes HOW you fight, not whether you can. Backgrounds are orthogonal to origin/domain — they never gate a craft, only color the approach.

line_soldier.lore: You stood in a line with people on either side of you and you did not step back. That is the whole art and it is harder than it sounds.
line_soldier.gmHint: Thinks in formations. Trusts the person beside them instantly and completely, which has been exploited.
line_soldier.mechanics: Affinity: Fight — actions in this vein come a little easier. Grants the rough and ready aptitude at creation. A martial background: it shapes HOW you fight, not whether you can. Backgrounds are orthogonal to origin/domain — they never gate a craft, only color the approach.

skirmisher.lore: You fought in the gaps — flanks, woods, night. Never a fair fight if you could help it, and you could usually help it.
skirmisher.gmHint: Instinctively finds the angle nobody is watching. Uncomfortable in the open. Bad at ceremony.
skirmisher.mechanics: Affinity: Fight, Chase — actions in this vein come a little easier. Grants the rough and ready aptitude at creation. A martial background: it shapes HOW you fight, not whether you can. Backgrounds are orthogonal to origin/domain — they never gate a craft, only color the approach.

warden.lore: You protected a place, or a person, or a road, for years, and mostly nothing happened, and you stayed ready anyway.
warden.gmHint: Watches doors. Has the specific patience of someone who has waited a decade for one bad night.
warden.mechanics: Affinity: Fight, Investigate — actions in this vein come a little easier. Grants the rough and ready aptitude at creation. A martial background: it shapes HOW you fight, not whether you can. Backgrounds are orthogonal to origin/domain — they never gate a craft, only color the approach.

hunter.lore: You tracked, waited, and killed what you needed and nothing you didn't. The old Valley ethic in a single motion.
hunter.gmHint: Reads ground and weather. Uneasy about hunting people, and has, and doesn't discuss it.
hunter.mechanics: Affinity: Explore, Fight — actions in this vein come a little easier. Grants the rough and ready aptitude at creation. A martial background: it shapes HOW you fight, not whether you can. Backgrounds are orthogonal to origin/domain — they never gate a craft, only color the approach.

bodyguard.lore: Your job was for somebody else to survive. Sometimes they did.
bodyguard.gmHint: Places themselves between people and doors without noticing they are doing it. Cannot enjoy a meal facing away from the room.
bodyguard.mechanics: Affinity: Fight, Social — actions in this vein come a little easier. Grants the rough and ready aptitude at creation. A martial background: it shapes HOW you fight, not whether you can. Backgrounds are orthogonal to origin/domain — they never gate a craft, only color the approach.

war_leader.lore: You gave the orders. Some of them got people killed and some of them were right and a few were both.
war_leader.gmHint: Assesses a fight as a problem of resources and morale. Carries a specific list of names.
war_leader.mechanics: Affinity: Fight, Social — actions in this vein come a little easier. Grants the banner aptitude at creation. A martial background: it shapes HOW you fight, not whether you can. Backgrounds are orthogonal to origin/domain — they never gate a craft, only color the approach.

arena_fighter.lore: You fought for a crowd, for money, under rules — and you have thought a great deal about the difference between a contest and a killing.
arena_fighter.gmHint: Performs. Knows exactly how to make a fight look better than it is. Has met the Coliseum's champions.
arena_fighter.mechanics: Affinity: Fight, Social — actions in this vein come a little easier. Grants the rough and ready aptitude at creation. A martial background: it shapes HOW you fight, not whether you can. Backgrounds are orthogonal to origin/domain — they never gate a craft, only color the approach.

temple_trained.lore: You learned your craft properly, in a house of it, from people who had done it for generations. You know the forms. You also know what the forms cost.
temple_trained.gmHint: Cites the correct method. Genuinely pained by sloppy practice. Has a teacher whose approval still matters.
temple_trained.mechanics: Affinity: Investigate — actions in this vein come a little easier. Grants the faithful aptitude at creation. A practitioner background: it shapes how you came to your craft and what it obliges. Backgrounds are orthogonal to origin/domain — they never gate a craft, only color the approach.

self_taught.lore: Nobody taught you. You worked it out, alone, from wreckage and stubbornness, and you have gaps a temple-trained practitioner would find horrifying and instincts they will never have.
self_taught.gmHint: Unorthodox and effective. Bristles at correction. Occasionally does something no trained practitioner would think to try, and it works.
self_taught.mechanics: Affinity: Explore — actions in this vein come a little easier. Grants the faithful aptitude at creation. A practitioner background: it shapes how you came to your craft and what it obliges. Backgrounds are orthogonal to origin/domain — they never gate a craft, only color the approach.

lineage_taught.lore: Your craft came down through your family, and it came with obligations, and you did not get to decline either.
lineage_taught.gmHint: Carries the family's reputation whether they want it or not. Someone, somewhere, is owed.
lineage_taught.mechanics: Affinity: Social — actions in this vein come a little easier. Grants the faithful aptitude at creation. A practitioner background: it shapes how you came to your craft and what it obliges. Backgrounds are orthogonal to origin/domain — they never gate a craft, only color the approach.

precursor_marked.lore: Something in the old lattice touched you and did not entirely let go. You did not ask for this and you cannot give it back.
precursor_marked.gmHint: The old works notice them. Address-Sense comes unbidden. Something is faintly, permanently different about them, and people can tell.
precursor_marked.mechanics: Affinity: Investigate, Explore — actions in this vein come a little easier. Grants the faithful aptitude at creation. A practitioner background: it shapes how you came to your craft and what it obliges. Backgrounds are orthogonal to origin/domain — they never gate a craft, only color the approach.

battlefield_taught.lore: You learned your craft while it was being used on you. There was no theory and there was no second attempt.
battlefield_taught.gmHint: Fast, brutal, and effective under pressure; theoretically shaky. Cannot explain WHY it works, only THAT it does.
battlefield_taught.mechanics: Affinity: Fight — actions in this vein come a little easier. Grants the faithful aptitude at creation. A practitioner background: it shapes how you came to your craft and what it obliges. Backgrounds are orthogonal to origin/domain — they never gate a craft, only color the approach.

apprenticed_to_a_legend.lore: You were taught by one of the great ones. You were not their best student. You are still better than almost everyone else.
apprenticed_to_a_legend.gmHint: Name-drops nothing, ever, and it comes out anyway. Measures themselves against an impossible standard, permanently.
apprenticed_to_a_legend.mechanics: Affinity: Investigate, Fight — actions in this vein come a little easier. Grants the faithful aptitude at creation. A practitioner background: it shapes how you came to your craft and what it obliges. Backgrounds are orthogonal to origin/domain — they never gate a craft, only color the approach.

found_it_by_accident.lore: You did a thing you should not have been able to do, once, in a bad moment, and you have spent every year since trying to understand what happened.
found_it_by_accident.gmHint: Genuinely does not know their own ceiling. Frightened of their own craft in a way trained practitioners find superstitious.
found_it_by_accident.mechanics: Affinity: Explore — actions in this vein come a little easier. Grants the faithful aptitude at creation. A practitioner background: it shapes how you came to your craft and what it obliges. Backgrounds are orthogonal to origin/domain — they never gate a craft, only color the approach.

craftsman.lore: Making, mending, material sense. Your hands know things your mouth cannot explain.
craftsman.gmHint: Assesses everything by how it was made. Physically pained by shoddy work.
craftsman.mechanics: Affinity: Explore, Investigate — actions in this vein come a little easier. Grants the artisan aptitude at creation. Backgrounds are orthogonal to origin/domain — they never gate a craft, only color the approach.

mechanist.lore: Systems, pressure, tolerance, failure. You have taken apart things that were not supposed to be taken apart.
mechanist.gmHint: Sees the mechanism under everything, including institutions and people. This is sometimes a gift.
mechanist.mechanics: Affinity: Investigate — actions in this vein come a little easier. Grants the artisan aptitude at creation. Backgrounds are orthogonal to origin/domain — they never gate a craft, only color the approach.

smith.lore: Heat, metal, and the specific stubbornness of a material that must be persuaded rather than forced.
smith.gmHint: Strong hands, long patience, and an unnerving stillness. Judges a person by their tools.
smith.mechanics: Affinity: Explore, Fight — actions in this vein come a little easier. Grants the artisan aptitude at creation. Backgrounds are orthogonal to origin/domain — they never gate a craft, only color the approach.

builder.lore: Walls, roofs, bridges — things that must hold with people underneath them.
builder.gmHint: Assesses every structure for load and failure, unconsciously, always. Sleeps badly under bad beams.
builder.mechanics: Affinity: Explore — actions in this vein come a little easier. Grants the artisan aptitude at creation. Backgrounds are orthogonal to origin/domain — they never gate a craft, only color the approach.

trader.lore: Roads, prices, and the exact moment a deal turns. You have been cheated and you learned from it.
trader.gmHint: Prices everything reflexively, including favors. Knows what a thing is worth to THIS person, which is different.
trader.mechanics: Affinity: Social — actions in this vein come a little easier. Grants the artisan aptitude at creation. Backgrounds are orthogonal to origin/domain — they never gate a craft, only color the approach.

farmer.lore: Seasons, soil, animals, and the patience of people who cannot hurry the thing they depend on.
farmer.gmHint: Unhurried in a way that infuriates cities. Right about the weather. Right about the animal.
farmer.mechanics: Affinity: Explore — actions in this vein come a little easier. Grants the artisan aptitude at creation. Backgrounds are orthogonal to origin/domain — they never gate a craft, only color the approach.

river_runner.lore: The waterways, the crossings, the currents. You have pulled people out and you have failed to.
river_runner.gmHint: Reads water the way others read faces. Uncomfortable far from it.
river_runner.mechanics: Affinity: Explore, Chase — actions in this vein come a little easier. Grants the artisan aptitude at creation. Backgrounds are orthogonal to origin/domain — they never gate a craft, only color the approach.

survivalist.lore: You have been cold, hungry, and alone, and you came back, and you know exactly what that took.
survivalist.gmHint: Always knows the exits, the water, and the days of food. Finds comfort suspicious.
survivalist.mechanics: Affinity: Explore — actions in this vein come a little easier. Grants the artisan aptitude at creation. Backgrounds are orthogonal to origin/domain — they never gate a craft, only color the approach.

scholar.lore: Years with the records, and the knowledge of how much of what everyone believes is simply not in them.
scholar.gmHint: Cites sources unprompted. Delighted by a primary document. Distrusts a story with no paper.
scholar.mechanics: Affinity: Investigate — actions in this vein come a little easier. Grants the scholar aptitude at creation. Backgrounds are orthogonal to origin/domain — they never gate a craft, only color the approach.

archivist.lore: You keep what would otherwise be lost, and you have watched people try very hard to lose specific things.
archivist.gmHint: Notices what is MISSING from a record, which is a rarer skill than reading one.
archivist.mechanics: Affinity: Investigate — actions in this vein come a little easier. Grants the scholar aptitude at creation. Backgrounds are orthogonal to origin/domain — they never gate a craft, only color the approach.

physician.lore: You have had your hands inside someone who was dying. Sometimes it worked.
physician.gmHint: Triages automatically, including people who did not ask. Does not flinch, and that unsettles people.
physician.mechanics: Affinity: Investigate, Social — actions in this vein come a little easier. Grants the scholar aptitude at creation. Backgrounds are orthogonal to origin/domain — they never gate a craft, only color the approach.

lawspeaker.lore: You know what the rules actually say, as opposed to what everyone assumes, and the gap is where you live.
lawspeaker.gmHint: Finds the clause. Infuriating and indispensable in roughly equal measure.
lawspeaker.mechanics: Affinity: Social, Investigate — actions in this vein come a little easier. Grants the scholar aptitude at creation. Backgrounds are orthogonal to origin/domain — they never gate a craft, only color the approach.

cartographer.lore: You made maps, which means you have been to the edges of them.
cartographer.gmHint: Cannot stop orienting. Deeply disturbed by a place that resists being mapped.
cartographer.mechanics: Affinity: Explore — actions in this vein come a little easier. Grants the scholar aptitude at creation. Backgrounds are orthogonal to origin/domain — they never gate a craft, only color the approach.

envoy.lore: You spoke for people who could not be in the room, to people who did not want them there.
envoy.gmHint: Reads a table instantly. Never says the first thing. Has sold something out and thinks about it.
envoy.mechanics: Affinity: Social — actions in this vein come a little easier. Grants the silver tongue aptitude at creation. Backgrounds are orthogonal to origin/domain — they never gate a craft, only color the approach.

performer.lore: You have held a room. You know the true thing and the thing they will listen to are not always the same.
performer.gmHint: Shapes events into narrative instinctively. Sometimes the shaping is the lie.
performer.mechanics: Affinity: Social — actions in this vein come a little easier. Grants the silver tongue aptitude at creation. Backgrounds are orthogonal to origin/domain — they never gate a craft, only color the approach.

devotee.lore: You gave years to a practice, an order, or a certainty — and you either kept it or you did not, and either way it shaped you.
devotee.gmHint: Has a discipline. Keeps it, or misses it. Reacts strongly to other people's faith.
devotee.mechanics: Affinity: Social, Investigate — actions in this vein come a little easier. Grants the faithful aptitude at creation. Backgrounds are orthogonal to origin/domain — they never gate a craft, only color the approach.

organizer.lore: You held a group of people together through something. It worked, mostly.
organizer.gmHint: Reads a room's factions instantly. Cannot stop trying to fix them.
organizer.mechanics: Affinity: Social — actions in this vein come a little easier. Grants the banner aptitude at creation. Backgrounds are orthogonal to origin/domain — they never gate a craft, only color the approach.

broker.lore: You know who wants what and who has it, and you take a cut for closing the distance.
broker.gmHint: Knows a guy. Genuinely knows a guy. Owes and is owed, extensively.
broker.mechanics: Affinity: Social — actions in this vein come a little easier. Grants the silver tongue aptitude at creation. Backgrounds are orthogonal to origin/domain — they never gate a craft, only color the approach.

spy.lore: You were somewhere you should not have been, listening, for years, and nobody ever knew.
spy.gmHint: Remembers everything anyone says near them. Lies smoothly and dislikes doing it.
spy.mechanics: Affinity: Social, Investigate — actions in this vein come a little easier. Grants the shadow aptitude at creation. Backgrounds are orthogonal to origin/domain — they never gate a craft, only color the approach.

smuggler.lore: You moved what was not supposed to move. You were caught once, and only once.
smuggler.gmHint: Notices the locks, the sightlines, the guard's habits. Cannot walk into a room without casing it.
smuggler.mechanics: Affinity: Chase, Investigate — actions in this vein come a little easier. Grants the trickster aptitude at creation. Backgrounds are orthogonal to origin/domain — they never gate a craft, only color the approach.

orphan.lore: Nobody raised you and you raised yourself, and you are not going to make a speech about it.
orphan.gmHint: Trusts slowly and completely. Very hard to shock. Hoards small things.
orphan.mechanics: Affinity: Chase, Social — actions in this vein come a little easier. Grants the shadow aptitude at creation. Backgrounds are orthogonal to origin/domain — they never gate a craft, only color the approach.

exile.lore: You cannot go home. You know exactly why. You may or may not think it was fair.
exile.gmHint: Guarded about their own past in a way that reads as arrogance. Reacts badly to being judged by strangers.
exile.mechanics: Affinity: Social — actions in this vein come a little easier. Grants the shadow aptitude at creation. Backgrounds are orthogonal to origin/domain — they never gate a craft, only color the approach.

ruin_picker.lore: You went into the Precursor places and came out with things, and you are still here, which puts you in a small category.
ruin_picker.gmHint: Fearless about old tech in a way that alarms sensible people. Has an unexplained scar and a rule about doors.
ruin_picker.mechanics: Affinity: Explore, Investigate — actions in this vein come a little easier. Grants the shadow aptitude at creation. Backgrounds are orthogonal to origin/domain — they never gate a craft, only color the approach.

drifter.lore: You have been everywhere and stayed nowhere and it stopped being a phase some time ago.
drifter.gmHint: Knows a little about everywhere and belongs nowhere. Leaves before it gets hard.
drifter.mechanics: Affinity: Explore — actions in this vein come a little easier. Grants the shadow aptitude at creation. Backgrounds are orthogonal to origin/domain — they never gate a craft, only color the approach.

former_professional.lore: Pre-Transition career skills, and the connections that came with them — some of which still answer.
former_professional.gmHint: Knows procedure and who to call. Uneasy with how little of it still works.
former_professional.mechanics: Affinity: Social, Investigate — actions in this vein come a little easier. Grants the shadow aptitude at creation. Backgrounds are orthogonal to origin/domain — they never gate a craft, only color the approach.

valleyfolk.lore: Born to the Valley floor — the near-center crossing where order, light, practical craft and making all cross faintly. Your people are generalists because the center holds a little of everything.
valleyfolk.whyHere: You never left. This is home, and the world is arriving at your door whether you asked it to or not.
valleyfolk.mechanics: Native tradition: Valley Craft — you draw on it by right, and its crafts are yours to learn as you grow (innate substrate access). Pole-leaning: Balanced — your home ground sits toward this end of the world's axes, coloring which crafts feel natural. Home region: The Valley — where you begin, and where your people's standing starts warm. Origin sets your starting tradition access and homeland; it never caps what you can reach, only where you start from.

harmonic.lore: Raised in the resonance-halls of the Heights — tuned stone, sung joints, sound as a working craft. A Valley folk-tradition, a foothill of the great mechanical and ordered peoples.
harmonic.whyHere: You came down. Something in the Heights stopped ringing true and you wanted to know why.
harmonic.mechanics: Native tradition: Harmonic — you draw on it by right, and its crafts are yours to learn as you grow (innate substrate access). Pole-leaning: Order · Sound — your home ground sits toward this end of the world's axes, coloring which crafts feel natural. Home region: The Valley — where you begin, and where your people's standing starts warm. Origin sets your starting tradition access and homeland; it never caps what you can reach, only where you start from.

radiant_plateau.lore: Raised on the Plateau among prisms and worked light — revelation as a craft, not as a burning. Folk-Radiance, the gentle cousin of the Blaze.
radiant_plateau.whyHere: You came down the Plateau road and did not go back up it.
radiant_plateau.mechanics: Native tradition: Radiant Folk — you draw on it by right, and its crafts are yours to learn as you grow (innate substrate access). Pole-leaning: Light · Order — your home ground sits toward this end of the world's axes, coloring which crafts feel natural. Home region: The Valley — where you begin, and where your people's standing starts warm. Origin sets your starting tradition access and homeland; it never caps what you can reach, only where you start from.

umbral.lore: Born in the Underlight, where sight is a thing you do without eyes and the dark is not an absence but a country. Your people harbor what the light would destroy.
umbral.whyHere: You came up. You have not said why, and the surface hurts your eyes, and you have not gone back.
umbral.mechanics: Native tradition: Umbral — you draw on it by right, and its crafts are yours to learn as you grow (innate substrate access). Pole-leaning: Dark — your home ground sits toward this end of the world's axes, coloring which crafts feel natural. Home region: The Umbral Depths — where you begin, and where your people's standing starts warm. Origin sets your starting tradition access and homeland; it never caps what you can reach, only where you start from.

blazeborn.lore: Born in the Blaze, where the light is so total it has burned the land to glass. Revelation is your inheritance and it is not always a kindness.
blazeborn.whyHere: The Blaze is expanding. You walked out ahead of it, and you are the first of your people the Valley has seen.
blazeborn.mechanics: Native tradition: Blazeborn — you draw on it by right, and its crafts are yours to learn as you grow (innate substrate access). Pole-leaning: Light — your home ground sits toward this end of the world's axes, coloring which crafts feel natural. Home region: The Radiant Wastes — where you begin, and where your people's standing starts warm. Origin sets your starting tradition access and homeland; it never caps what you can reach, only where you start from.

rootkin.lore: Born to the grove-cities that grow rather than build. Your people plant for grandchildren and measure a life in centuries.
rootkin.whyHere: You were sent, or you were seeded, or you simply wanted to see something finish inside a single lifetime.
rootkin.mechanics: Native tradition: Rootkin — you draw on it by right, and its crafts are yours to learn as you grow (innate substrate access). Pole-leaning: Life — your home ground sits toward this end of the world's axes, coloring which crafts feel natural. Home region: The Quickwood — where you begin, and where your people's standing starts warm. Origin sets your starting tradition access and homeland; it never caps what you can reach, only where you start from.

ashwarden.lore: Born to the Hollow March, where endings are tended the way the Rootkin tend growth. Your people are not morbid; they are simply unhurried and honest about where everything is going.
ashwarden.whyHere: Something in the Valley is ending badly and untended, and your people noticed, and they sent you.
ashwarden.mechanics: Native tradition: Ashwarden — you draw on it by right, and its crafts are yours to learn as you grow (innate substrate access). Pole-leaning: Death — your home ground sits toward this end of the world's axes, coloring which crafts feel natural. Home region: The Palelands — where you begin, and where your people's standing starts warm. Origin sets your starting tradition access and homeland; it never caps what you can reach, only where you start from.

marcher.lore: Born to the Riven Marches, a warrior culture that is honed conflict all the way down. You were taught the line, and how to hold it, and what it costs.
marcher.whyHere: You put down the blade, or you were sent away from it, or you are looking for a line worth holding that isn't theirs.
marcher.mechanics: Native tradition: Marcher — you draw on it by right, and its crafts are yours to learn as you grow (innate substrate access). Pole-leaning: Violence — your home ground sits toward this end of the world's axes, coloring which crafts feel natural. Home region: The Riven Marches — where you begin, and where your people's standing starts warm. Origin sets your starting tradition access and homeland; it never caps what you can reach, only where you start from.

stillhold.lore: Born inside a peace so absolute it has become a kind of prison. You know how to bind, de-escalate, and make a truce that holds — and you know what perfect quiet costs.
stillhold.whyHere: You left the walls. You wanted a peace that was chosen rather than enforced, and you have not found it yet.
stillhold.mechanics: Native tradition: Stillhold — you draw on it by right, and its crafts are yours to learn as you grow (innate substrate access). Pole-leaning: Peace — your home ground sits toward this end of the world's axes, coloring which crafts feel natural. Home region: The Stillhold — where you begin, and where your people's standing starts warm. Origin sets your starting tradition access and homeland; it never caps what you can reach, only where you start from.

somatic.lore: Raised in the Flesh-Temples, where the body is the only instrument and movement is a language. You do not talk about what your body can do; you show people, once.
somatic.whyHere: You are looking for something the perfected body cannot answer, and you have started to suspect there is one.
somatic.mechanics: Native tradition: Somatic — you draw on it by right, and its crafts are yours to learn as you grow (innate substrate access). Pole-leaning: Body — your home ground sits toward this end of the world's axes, coloring which crafts feel natural. Home region: The Somatic Reaches — where you begin, and where your people's standing starts warm. Origin sets your starting tradition access and homeland; it never caps what you can reach, only where you start from.

cogitant.lore: Raised in the Cogitarium, among people who have nearly left their bodies behind for pure thought and pay for it daily.
cogitant.whyHere: You noticed the paying. You came out to see whether there was another way to be a mind.
cogitant.mechanics: Native tradition: Cogitant — you draw on it by right, and its crafts are yours to learn as you grow (innate substrate access). Pole-leaning: Mind — your home ground sits toward this end of the world's axes, coloring which crafts feel natural. Home region: The Cogitarium — where you begin, and where your people's standing starts warm. Origin sets your starting tradition access and homeland; it never caps what you can reach, only where you start from.

churnfolk.lore: Born in the Churn, where nothing is planned twice and living is improvisation. Your people are joyous, exhausting, and never bored.
churnfolk.whyHere: You wanted to see whether a place where things STAY PUT was as dull as everyone said. The jury is out.
churnfolk.mechanics: Native tradition: Churnfolk — you draw on it by right, and its crafts are yours to learn as you grow (innate substrate access). Pole-leaning: Chaos — your home ground sits toward this end of the world's axes, coloring which crafts feel natural. Home region: The Unspooling — where you begin, and where your people's standing starts warm. Origin sets your starting tradition access and homeland; it never caps what you can reach, only where you start from.

lattice.lore: Born in the arcologies, where nothing is unplanned and — this is the part nobody says aloud — nothing is free.
lattice.whyHere: You did something unplanned. It was very small, and it was enough, and you are not going back.
lattice.mechanics: Native tradition: Lattice — you draw on it by right, and its crafts are yours to learn as you grow (innate substrate access). Pole-leaning: Order — your home ground sits toward this end of the world's axes, coloring which crafts feel natural. Home region: The Lattice-Cities — where you begin, and where your people's standing starts warm. Origin sets your starting tradition access and homeland; it never caps what you can reach, only where you start from.

enginewright.lore: Born in the Gearlands, where the world is mechanism all the way down and every problem is, eventually, a maintenance problem.
enginewright.whyHere: There is Precursor work in the Valley that nobody there understands, and you understand it, and that is dangerous for everyone including you.
enginewright.mechanics: Native tradition: Enginewright — you draw on it by right, and its crafts are yours to learn as you grow (innate substrate access). Pole-leaning: Mechanical — your home ground sits toward this end of the world's axes, coloring which crafts feel natural. Home region: The Gearlands — where you begin, and where your people's standing starts warm. Origin sets your starting tradition access and homeland; it never caps what you can reach, only where you start from.

numinous.lore: Raised where the veil is thin and most of material life has been dissolved into pure practice. You have seen things you cannot make a sentence out of.
numinous.whyHere: You came back into the world to find out whether it still holds anything worth staying material for.
numinous.mechanics: Native tradition: Numinous — you draw on it by right, and its crafts are yours to learn as you grow (innate substrate access). Pole-leaning: Spiritual — your home ground sits toward this end of the world's axes, coloring which crafts feel natural. Home region: The Numinous Reach — where you begin, and where your people's standing starts warm. Origin sets your starting tradition access and homeland; it never caps what you can reach, only where you start from.

threnodist.lore: Raised among the grief-houses and joy-halls, where feeling is held to be the only true knowing and nobody weeps privately.
threnodist.whyHere: You met someone who did not feel things out loud and you found it horrifying, and then you found it interesting.
threnodist.mechanics: Native tradition: Threnodist — you draw on it by right, and its crafts are yours to learn as you grow (innate substrate access). Pole-leaning: Emotional — your home ground sits toward this end of the world's axes, coloring which crafts feel natural. Home region: The Feeling Coast — where you begin, and where your people's standing starts warm. Origin sets your starting tradition access and homeland; it never caps what you can reach, only where you start from.

syllogist.lore: Raised in the Axiom, reasoning from first principles, taught that emotion is noise in the signal.
syllogist.whyHere: You encountered a true thing that reason could not reach. It is still bothering you. That is why you are here.
syllogist.mechanics: Native tradition: Syllogist — you draw on it by right, and its crafts are yours to learn as you grow (innate substrate access). Pole-leaning: Logical — your home ground sits toward this end of the world's axes, coloring which crafts feel natural. Home region: The Reasoned Hold — where you begin, and where your people's standing starts warm. Origin sets your starting tradition access and homeland; it never caps what you can reach, only where you start from.

veilwright.lore: Born to the Hall of Mirrors, where every truth is held to be a made thing, and your people simply make better ones.
veilwright.whyHere: Somebody made a truth about YOU, and you did not care for it, and you have developed a complicated relationship with your own craft.
veilwright.mechanics: Native tradition: Veilwright — you draw on it by right, and its crafts are yours to learn as you grow (innate substrate access). Pole-leaning: Falsehood — your home ground sits toward this end of the world's axes, coloring which crafts feel natural. Home region: The Veiled Reach — where you begin, and where your people's standing starts warm. Origin sets your starting tradition access and homeland; it never caps what you can reach, only where you start from.

verist.lore: Raised at the Unblinking Stone, where you say what is so, whatever it costs — and it costs.
verist.whyHere: You told the truth to the wrong person and it went exactly as your people said it would, and they were right, and you left anyway.
verist.mechanics: Native tradition: Verist — you draw on it by right, and its crafts are yours to learn as you grow (innate substrate access). Pole-leaning: Truth — your home ground sits toward this end of the world's axes, coloring which crafts feel natural. Home region: The Stark Reach — where you begin, and where your people's standing starts warm. Origin sets your starting tradition access and homeland; it never caps what you can reach, only where you start from.

abyssal.lore: Raised among people who name appetite plainly and strike bargains that are exactly, horribly fair. Your people are honest about want in a way the pious cannot manage.
abyssal.whyHere: You were owed something and collecting it would have cost more than it was worth, and you walked away from a fair bargain, which your people found shocking.
abyssal.mechanics: Native tradition: Abyssal — you draw on it by right, and its crafts are yours to learn as you grow (innate substrate access). Pole-leaning: Demonic — your home ground sits toward this end of the world's axes, coloring which crafts feel natural. Home region: The Descent — where you begin, and where your people's standing starts warm. Origin sets your starting tradition access and homeland; it never caps what you can reach, only where you start from.

seraphic.lore: Raised in the Choir-Height, luminous and hierarchical and certain. Your people's mercy is real. So is their judgment.
seraphic.whyHere: You were wrong about someone, and the judgment bound anyway, and you have been trying to unmake it ever since.
seraphic.mechanics: Native tradition: Seraphic — you draw on it by right, and its crafts are yours to learn as you grow (innate substrate access). Pole-leaning: Angelic — your home ground sits toward this end of the world's axes, coloring which crafts feel natural. Home region: The Ascent — where you begin, and where your people's standing starts warm. Origin sets your starting tradition access and homeland; it never caps what you can reach, only where you start from.

mason.lore: Born to the Bedrock, where only what can be touched is real. Your people build things that outlast the arguments about them.
mason.whyHere: There is a thing you cannot weigh that you are nonetheless certain is real, and you cannot say that at home.
mason.mechanics: Native tradition: Mason — you draw on it by right, and its crafts are yours to learn as you grow (innate substrate access). Pole-leaning: Concrete — your home ground sits toward this end of the world's axes, coloring which crafts feel natural. Home region: The Given Land — where you begin, and where your people's standing starts warm. Origin sets your starting tradition access and homeland; it never caps what you can reach, only where you start from.

figurist.lore: Raised in the Cloudform, among buildings that are arguments and a geography that resists being mapped. Matter, to your people, is the coarsest layer of the real.
figurist.whyHere: You wanted to touch something. Simply that. It is considered a shameful appetite where you are from.
figurist.mechanics: Native tradition: Figurist — you draw on it by right, and its crafts are yours to learn as you grow (innate substrate access). Pole-leaning: Abstract — your home ground sits toward this end of the world's axes, coloring which crafts feel natural. Home region: The Pattern Reach — where you begin, and where your people's standing starts warm. Origin sets your starting tradition access and homeland; it never caps what you can reach, only where you start from.

horizon.lore: Born to the road, to a people for whom everywhere is a place not yet arrived. You have no home region because your people do not have one.
horizon.whyHere: You stopped. You do not know why yet, and neither do they, and it may be the most significant thing you have ever done.
horizon.mechanics: Native tradition: Horizon — you draw on it by right, and its crafts are yours to learn as you grow (innate substrate access). hourkeeper.lore: Raised among clock-towers and archives that run forward. Your people remember and pre-remember, and pay for both.
hourkeeper.whyHere: You saw an hour that had not happened and it was terrible, and you have come to find out whether it is avoidable.
hourkeeper.mechanics: Native tradition: Hourkeeper — you draw on it by right, and its crafts are yours to learn as you grow (innate substrate access). unmaker.lore: Born to the Scour, where ending a thing WELL is a craft and the world is held to be choked with what should have ended.
unmaker.whyHere: Something in the Valley should end and nobody there can bear to do it, and you can, and you have not decided whether you will.
unmaker.mechanics: Native tradition: Unmaker — you draw on it by right, and its crafts are yours to learn as you grow (innate substrate access). wright.lore: Raised in the Forge-Eternal, where the cities are never finished and that is the entire point. Your people cannot stop making.
wright.whyHere: You finished something. Completely. It nearly got you exiled, and you are still not sure they were wrong.
wright.mechanics: Native tradition: Wright — you draw on it by right, and its crafts are yours to learn as you grow (innate substrate access).
